name: Potatoes with Asafetida and Cumin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, peel, and quarter the potatoes.
2. Place the potatoes in a bowl with cold water to cover.
3. In a 2-3 quart pot, heat oil over medium heat until hot.
4. Drain the potatoes in a colander.
5. Add asafetida to the hot oil; stir for about 5 seconds.
6. Add cumin seeds and stir for another 5-10 seconds when they sizzle and change color.
7. Add the red peppers, which will begin to change color in just 2 or 3 seconds.
8. Add the drained potatoes and turmeric powder.
9. Fry the potatoes for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Add 2 cups of water, tomato sauce, and salt.
11. Bring the mixture to a boil.
12. Cover and allow it to simmer gently for about 1 1/2 hours.
13. Serve in a deep dish, allowing diners to ladle individual servings into their own small bowls.
14. Flatbreads provide an excellent accompaniment to this dish.
15. Leftovers can be mashed in a blender to reincarnate as a delicious soup.
